spell.name: Heal Animal
spell.text:
You heal an animal's wounds, restoring 1d8 Hit Points to the target. The number of actions spent Casting this Spell determines its effect.  
  
 The spell has a range of touch.  
 (concentrate) The spell has a range of 30 feet and restores an additional 8 Hit Points to the target.

heightened.text: The amount of healing increases by 1d8, and the additional healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.
